g.title: note
g.text: Can a phase tree be clearer than the full left-to-right FSM?
If yes, the next step is to rebuild the detailed graph in this style.

g.title: qk_chunk_loop
g.text: repeat over dK in chunks of nRows

g.title: softmax_pass1
g.text: scan row, compute running max + sum

g.title: softmax_pass2
g.text: normalize and write probs into aTileBuf

g.title: pv_chunk_loop
g.text: repeat over kvRows in chunks of nRows
